values.content:
=Generate a MASTER SERMON package based on the following input.

INPUT TYPE: {{ $('Build System Prompt').item.json.input_type }}
CONTENT: {{ $('Build System Prompt').item.json.processed_content }}

Generate ALL of the following and return as valid JSON:
{
  "title": "Sermon title",
  "big_idea": "One sentence central truth",
  "historical_background": "3-4 paragraphs",
  "cultural_context": "2-3 paragraphs",
  "cross_references": [ { "verse": "Reference", "relevance": "Why it connects" } ],
  "character_studies": [ { "character": "Name", "lesson": "Lesson" } ],
  "verse_by_verse_commentary": [
    { "verse": "Verse reference", "commentary": "Detailed exposition paragraph" }
  ],
  "main_points": [
    { "point": "Title", "explanation": "Full paragraph", "scripture": "Key verse", "application": "Application", "illustration": "Story or example" }
  ],
  "applications": ["Application 1", "Application 2", "Application 3"],
  "introduction": "Full introduction (3 paragraphs)",
  "conclusion": "Full conclusion (3 paragraphs)",
  "childrens_message": "Short 3-5 minute message for children on the same theme",
  "object_lesson": { "object": "Item to use", "lesson": "How to use it to teach the truth" },
  "discussion_questions": ["Question 1", "Question 2", "Question 3", "Question 4", "Question 5"],
  "key_takeaways": ["Takeaway 1", "Takeaway 2", "Takeaway 3"],
  "estimated_speaking_time": "X minutes",
  "scripture_reference": "Primary passage"
}

Return ONLY the JSON object. No preamble, no markdown, no explanation.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ready', completed_at: new Date().toISOString(), sermon_json: $('Parse & Normalize Sermon Output').item.json.sermon }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'Sermon generated and emailed successfully', project_id: $('Build System Prompt').item.json.project_id, title: $('Parse & Normalize Sermon Output').item.json.sermon.title }) }}

parameters.subject: GraceTools: We're sorry — your credits have been refunded
parameters.html:
=

✚ GraceTools

We're sorry — something went wrong

Your sermon generation encountered an error. We've automatically refunded {{ $('Capture Error Context').item.json.credits_cost }} credits to your account.

Please try again. If the problem continues, reply to this email and we'll help you directly.

Try Again
